hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$(basename "$f")" in AGENTS.md|CLAUDE.md|GEMINI.md|CODEX.md) jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"You are editing a harness instruction file. REQUIRED: follow the writing-agent-instructions skill — terse imperative directives, one rule per line, no inline rationale (route the why to a commit or ADR), match the existing voice, cut any line that does not change agent behavior."}}' ;; esac
